events.summary: Sanofi CEO Brandicourt expressed interest in pursuing a possible strategic transaction with Medivation in an unsolicited telephone call.
notes: Initial unsolicited contact was March 22, 2016; substantive expression of interest occurred on March 25 call.

events.summary: J.P. Morgan retained as independent financial advisor to Medivation for defense and general strategic advice.
notes: Retention described as 'routine advanced preparedness for defense and general strategic advice.'

events.summary: Sanofi submitted a non-binding proposal to acquire Medivation for $52.50 per share in cash, subject to due diligence, definitive agreements, and Sanofi board approval.
notes: Letter dated April 13, 2016; received by Dr. Hung on April 15, 2016. Using authoring date per extraction rules.

events.summary: Sanofi issued a press release publicly announcing its $52.50 per share proposal for Medivation.
Sanofi issued a press release restating its $52.50 proposal and threatening to commence a consent solicitation to replace Medivation's board.
Medivation board determined to engage Evercore as an additional independent financial advisor.
Medivation retained Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz as an additional legal advisor.
notes: First mention is at the April 28 board meeting (B016). Exact retention date may be slightly earlier.

events.summary: Medivation board directed J.P. Morgan and Evercore to contact select industry participants to explore third-party interest, initiating a controlled sale process.
Sanofi submitted a revised unsolicited proposal of $58.00 per share in cash plus a CVR of up to $3.00 per share conditioned on revenue metrics.
notes: Includes CVR component conditioned on revenue metrics. Rejected unanimously by Medivation board on June 30.

events.summary: Medivation entered into a confidentiality agreement with Pfizer.
Medivation entered into a confidentiality agreement with one additional party (later identified as one of Company 1 through Company 4).
notes: Filing does not specify which named company this was. It is one of the four Interested Parties besides Pfizer.

events.summary: Medivation entered into a confidentiality agreement with Sanofi, which included a six-month standstill and Sanofi's agreement to terminate the Consent Solicitation.
Medivation announced via press release that it had entered into confidentiality agreements with Sanofi and other parties, and that the board had rejected Sanofi's revised $58.00 proposal.
Medivation entered into a confidentiality agreement with a fourth industry participant.
notes: Filing does not specify which named company; mapped to Company 2 by sequence but identity uncertain.

events.summary: Medivation entered into a confidentiality agreement with a fifth industry participant.
notes: Filing does not specify which named company; mapped to Company 3 by sequence but identity uncertain. Company 4 NDA not separately dated in the filing.

events.summary: J.P. Morgan and Evercore sent process letters requesting non-binding preliminary proposals by August 8, 2016.
notes: Letters sent to each of the five Interested Parties. Non-binding preliminary proposals requested.

events.summary: Pfizer submitted a preliminary proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation for $65.00 per share.
Company 1 submitted a preliminary proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation for $71.00 per share.
Company 2 submitted a preliminary proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation for $62.00-$64.00 per share.
Company 3 submitted a preliminary proposal to acquire Medivation for $60.00 per share in cash, plus CVRs of up to $10.00 per share conditioned on revenue metrics.
notes: Includes CVR component of up to $10.00 per share conditioned on revenue metrics.

events.summary: Company 4 submitted a preliminary proposal to acquire Medivation for $63.00 per share in cash, plus CVRs of up to $5.00 per share conditioned on regulatory milestones.
notes: Includes CVR component of up to $5.00 per share conditioned on regulatory milestones for pipeline assets.

events.summary: Deadline for submission of non-binding preliminary proposals at 5:00 p.m. Pacific Time.
notes: All five Interested Parties submitted proposals by this deadline.

events.summary: Company 2 was informed its preliminary proposal was not competitive and would not be invited to continue in the strategic transaction process.
events.drop_reason_text: preliminary proposals were not competitive with those of the other Interested Parties and that they would not be invited to continue in the strategic transaction process
notes: Target-initiated exclusion. Company 2 later re-entered with a revised $70.00 bid on August 11-12.

events.summary: Company 3 was informed its preliminary proposal was not competitive and would not be invited to continue in the strategic transaction process.
events.drop_reason_text: preliminary proposals were not competitive with those of the other Interested Parties and that they would not be invited to continue in the strategic transaction process
notes: Target-initiated exclusion. Company 3 later re-entered with a revised $70.50 bid on August 12.

events.summary: J.P. Morgan and Evercore sent written instruction letter requiring definitive written proposals by August 19, 2016, with merger agreement markups due August 18.
notes: Sent to each Interested Party. By this point Company 2 and Company 3 had re-entered with revised bids.

events.summary: Company 2 submitted a written revised proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation at $70.00 per share.
notes: Revised bid after being initially excluded from second round.

events.summary: Company 3 submitted a written revised proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation at $70.50 per share.
notes: Revised bid after being initially excluded from second round.

events.summary: Pfizer submitted a definitive proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation for $77.00 per share.
Company 1 submitted a definitive proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation for $73.00 per share.
notes: Company 1 also submitted a revised version of the merger agreement.

events.summary: Company 2 submitted a definitive proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation for $75.50 per share.
Company 3 submitted a definitive proposal for the all-cash acquisition of Medivation for $72.50 per share.
notes: Company 3 also submitted a revised version of the merger agreement.

events.summary: Formal final round deadline for definitive proposals at 12:00 p.m. Pacific Time on August 19, 2016.
notes: Four parties submitted definitive proposals (Pfizer, Company 1, Company 2, Company 3). Company 4 declined.

events.summary: Medivation board authorized financial advisors to communicate that best and final proposals would be due August 20, 2016 by 12:00 p.m. Pacific Time.
notes: Extension round announced same afternoon as the formal round deadline. Company 3 declined to participate.

events.summary: Pfizer submitted a revised final proposal to acquire Medivation for $81.50 per share in cash, approved by Pfizer's board and not subject to further diligence.
notes: Board-approved. Included a revised draft of the merger agreement. Filing notes absence of any financing condition.

events.summary: Company 1 submitted a revised final proposal to acquire Medivation for $80.25 per share in cash.
Company 2 submitted a revised final proposal to acquire Medivation for $80.00 per share in cash.
Best and final round deadline at 12:00 p.m. Pacific Time on August 20, 2016. Three parties submitted final proposals.
notes: Pfizer ($81.50), Company 1 ($80.25), and Company 2 ($80.00) submitted by the deadline.

events.summary: Pfizer and Medivation executed the merger agreement at $81.50 per share in cash, following unanimous board approval.
Pfizer and Medivation issued a joint press release announcing the transaction.
Douglas Giordano of Pfizer contacted Dr. Hung to indicate interest in participating in any strategic discussions Medivation might initiate.
Medivation issued a press release announcing the board's rejection of Sanofi's $52.50 proposal.

Sanofi was not among the parties advanced in the formal sale process. The board directed outreach only to Interested Parties (Pfizer, Company 1-4). Sanofi had signed an NDA with standstill but was not invited to bid.
events.drop_reason_text: Sanofi was bound by standstill and was not among the Interested Parties invited to submit preliminary or definitive proposals
notes: Sanofi's NDA included a six-month standstill. The filing does not describe a formal exclusion event; Sanofi simply was not invited to the process rounds.

coverage_notes: target_sale: extracted (evt_008) -- board directed advisors to contact industry participants on June 21-22, 2016
target_sale_public: NOT FOUND -- no public announcement of strategic review prior to the July 5 press release which is captured as sale_press_release
bidder_sale: NOT FOUND -- this was not an acquirer-initiated process; Sanofi made unsolicited approaches but the formal process was target-directed
bidder_interest: extracted (evt_001 Sanofi, evt_042 Pfizer) -- both expressed unsolicited interest before the formal process
activist_sale: NOT FOUND -- no activist involvement in this deal; Sanofi filed a consent solicitation but as a bidder, not an activist
sale_press_release: extracted (evt_013 July 5 NDA announcement, evt_043 April 29 rejection announcement)
bid_press_release: extracted (evt_004 Sanofi April 28, evt_005 Sanofi May 5, evt_041 Pfizer-Medivation August 22)
ib_retention: extracted (evt_002 J.P. Morgan, evt_006 Evercore, evt_007 Wachtell Lipton)

nda: extracted (evt_010 Pfizer, evt_011 Company 1, evt_012 Sanofi, evt_014 Company 2, evt_015 Company 3) -- Company 4 NDA timing not separately dated in filing but must have occurred given it was an Interested Party

proposal: extracted (evt_003 Sanofi $52.50, evt_009 Sanofi $58.00, evt_017-021 preliminary proposals Aug 8, evt_026-027 revised bids Aug 12, evt_028-031 definitive proposals Aug 19, evt_036-038 best-and-final proposals Aug 20)

drop: extracted (evt_023 Company 2 initial exclusion, evt_024 Company 3 initial exclusion, evt_032 Company 4 withdrawal, evt_035 Company 3 best-and-final withdrawal, evt_044 Sanofi standstill non-participation)
final_round_inf_ann: extracted (evt_016) -- process letters sent July 19-20 requesting preliminary proposals by August 8
final_round_inf: extracted (evt_022) -- August 8 deadline for non-binding preliminary proposals
final_round_ann: extracted (evt_025) -- instruction letter sent August 14 requiring definitive proposals by August 19
final_round: extracted (evt_033) -- August 19 deadline for definitive proposals
final_round_ext_ann: extracted (evt_034) -- best-and-final round announced afternoon of August 19 with August 20 deadline
final_round_ext: extracted (evt_039) -- August 20 deadline for best-and-final proposals
executed: extracted (evt_040) -- merger agreement executed August 20, 2016 at $81.50 per share
terminated: NOT FOUND -- the sale process was not terminated; it concluded with a signed merger agreement
restarted: NOT FOUND -- the sale process was not restarted; it ran continuously from June 2016 through execution
